---
title: "GLEAM Seurat v4/v5 input"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{GLEAM Seurat v4/v5 input}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, eval=FALSE}
# Seurat v5 layer path or v4 slot fallback
sc <- score_signature(
  object = seu,
  geneset = "hallmark",
  seurat = TRUE,
  assay = "RNA",
  layer = "data",
  slot = "data",
  method = "rank"
)
```
